forgotPassword.title: Ke lebetse phasewete ea ka.
forgotPassword.description: Kenya aterese ea hau ea lengolo-tsoibila 'me re tla u romella sehokelo sa ho seta phasewete bocha.

preferences.smsNotificationsDesc: Amohela melaetsa ea SMS bakeng sa litsebiso tsa bohlokoa.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Fumana litsebiso tsa push bakeng sa lintlafatso tsa hang-hang.

preferences.loadError: Likhetho ha lia ka tsa kenngoa.

hero.title: Sethala sa Khoebo sa Liphoofolo se Phelang
hero.subtitle: Sethala se tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang. Reka 'me u rekise likhomo le linku tsa hau ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng.

secure.title: Mabenkele a Sireletsehileng
secure.description: Litšebelisano tsohle li sireletsehile. Tlhahisoleseling ea morekisi le moreki e netefalitsoe.

variety.title: Mefuta e Meholo ea Lihlahisoa
variety.description: Likhomo, linku, le tse ling. Fumana phoofolo eo u e batlang habonolo.

support.title: Tšehetso ea 24/7
support.description: Re lula re le teng bakeng sa lipotso tsa hau. Mohala oa rona oa tšehetso o sebetsang o ntse o sebetsa.

cta.title: Qala Hona Joale
cta.subtitle: Nka sebaka sa hau sethaleng moo barekisi le bareki ba likete ba kopanang teng.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Khoebo ea Liphoofolo. Litokelo tsohle li sirelelitsoe.
footer.newsletterDescription: U se ke ua fetoa ke mananeo le lipapatso tsa morao-rao.
footer.tagline: Sethala sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang se tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa Turkey.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Ho kena ka Apple ho tla qala ho sebetsa haufinyane.

faq.title: Lipotso Tse Botsoang Khafetsa
faq.description: Likarabo tsa lipotso tseo u li botsoang khafetsa mabapi le sethala sa rona.
faq.noFaqs: Ha ho lipotso tse ekelitsoeng hajoale.

about.title: Mabapi le rona
about.subtitle: Sethala sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang se tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa Turkey.

mission.title: Thomo ea Rona
mission.description: Ka ho etsa hore kgwebo ya diphoofolo tse phelang e be ya dijithale, re ikemiseditse ho theha kgokelo e sireletsehileng, e bonaletsang, le e sebetsang hantle pakeng tsa bahlahisi le bareki.

vision.title: Pono ea Rōna
vision.description: Ho ba pula-maliboho phetohong ea dijithale lefapheng la temo le ho ba sethala sa lefats'e sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang.

trust.title: Tšepo
trust.description: Ponaletso le botshepehi ke tsa bohlokwa ditranseksheneng tsohle.

quality.title: Boleng
quality.description: Ntlafatso e tsoelang pele ho fana ka tšebeletso e ntle ka ho fetisisa.

innovation.title: Boiqapelo
innovation.description: Ho fetola indasteri ka ho sebelisa theknoloji.

contact.title: Puisano
contact.subtitle: Ka kopo ikopanye le rona haeba o na le lipotso.

form.title: Re ngolle
form.name: Lebitso la hau
form.subject: Sehlooho
form.success: Molaetsa oa hau o rometsoe ka katleho. Re tla khutlela ho uena kapele kamoo ho ka khonehang.
form.error: Phoso e hlahile ha ho romelloa molaetsa. Ka kopo leka hape.

acceptance.title: 1. Ho Amohela Melao
acceptance.content: Ka ho sebelisa websaete ena, o lumellana le lipehelo tse latelang tsa ts'ebeliso. Haeba o sa lumellane le lipehelo tsena, ka kopo o se ke oa sebelisa sebaka sena sa marang-rang.

services.title: 2. Litšebeletso
services.content: Khoebo ea Liphoofolo e fana ka sethala sa ho reka le ho rekisa liphoofolo tse phelang. Litšebelisano tsohle sethaleng ke boikarabello ba mosebelisi.

accounts.title: 3. Liakhaonto tsa Basebelisi
accounts.content: O tlameha ho fana ka tlhahisoleseding e nepahetseng le e ntjhafaditsweng ho theha ak'haonte. Tshireletso ya ak'haonte ya hao ke boikarabelo ba hao.

prohibited.title: 4. Mesebetsi e thibetsoeng
prohibited.content: Lipapatso tse khelosang, tlhahisoleseling ea bohata, bosholu le mesebetsi e seng molaong li thibetsoe ka tieo.

liability.title: 5. Moeli oa Boikarabello
liability.content: Sethala ha se ikarabelle ka ho toba bakeng sa ditransekshene pakeng tsa basebedisi. Ditransekshene tsohle di etsahala pakeng tsa mahlakore.

changes.title: 6. Liphetoho
changes.content: Melao le maemo ana a ka fetoha ntle le tsebiso. Liphetoho li tla qala ho sebetsa hang ha phatlalatso e phatlalatsoa.

collection.title: 1. Pokello ea Tlhahisoleseling
collection.content: Ha o theha ak'haonte, re bokella tlhahisoleseling ea botho joalo ka lebitso la hau, aterese ea lengolo-tsoibila le nomoro ea mohala. Re ka boela ra bokella tlhahisoleseling e sa tsejoeng mabapi le tšebeliso ea hau ea sebaka sa marang-rang.

usage.title: 2. Tšebeliso ea Tlhahisoleseling
usage.content: Tlhahisoleseding eo re e bokellang e sebelisetsoa ho fana ka lits'ebeletso tsa rona, ho laola ak'haonte ea hau, ho netefatsa ts'ireletso, le ho u fa litlhahiso tse ikhethileng.

sharing.title: 3. Ho Arolelana Tlhahisoleseding
sharing.content: Tlhahisoleseding ea hau ea botho e ke ke ea rekisoa kapa ea hirisoa ho batho ba bang. Tlhahisoleseding ea hau e ke ke ea arolelanoa ntle le merero e hlokahalang ka molao.

security.title: 4. Tšireletso
security.content: Mekhoa ea tšireletso ea maemo a indasteri e se e ntse e sebelisoa ho sireletsa lintlha tsa hau.

cookies.title: 5. Li-cookie
cookies.content: Webosaete ea rona e sebelisa li-cookie ho ntlafatsa boiphihlelo ba mosebelisi. U ka laola likhetho tsa li-cookie tsa hau litlhophisong tsa sebatli sa hau.

rights.title: 6. Litokelo tsa Hao
rights.content: Tlas'a Molao oa Tšireletso ea Lintlha tsa Motho ka Mong oa Turkey (KVKK), u na le tokelo ea ho fumana, ho lokisa le ho hlakola lintlha tsa hau tsa botho.

metadata.title: Khoebo ea Liphoofolo - Sethala sa Khoebo ea Liphoofolo tse Phelang
metadata.description: Sethala sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang se tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa lefatšeng. Ho reka le ho rekisa liphoofolo ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng le o bonaletsang.

about.title: Mabapi le rona
about.description: Ithute ka Khoebo ea Liphoofolo. Sethala se tšepahalang sa khoebo ea liphoofolo tse phelang.

contact.title: Puisano
contact.description: Ikopanye le rona. Sehlopha sa tšehetso ea bareki sa Livestock Trading se ikemiselitse ho u thusa.

terms.title: Lipehelo tsa tšebeliso
terms.description: Melao le Maemo a Khoebo ea Liphoofolo.

privacy.title: leano la lekunutu
privacy.description: Leano la lekunutu la Khoebo ea Liphoofolo. Ithute kamoo lintlha tsa hau tsa botho li sirelelitsoeng kateng.

products.title: Lihlahisoa
products.description: Sheba lenane la liphoofolo tse phelang. Lipapatso tse tšepahalang tsa likhomo, linku le tse ling.

sellers.title: Barekisi
sellers.description: Fumana barekisi ba liphoofolo ba tšepahalang. Liprofaele le litlhahlobo tse netefalitsoeng tsa barekisi.

transporters.title: bajari
transporters.description: Sibolla lik'hamphani tsa lipalangoang tsa liphoofolo. Tsamaiso ea liphoofolo tse phelang e bolokehileng le ea profeshenale.

search.title: Batla
search.description: Batla har'a lenane la liphoofolo tse phelang. Patlo e bonolo ka likhetho tsa ho sefa le ho hlopha.

faq.title: Lipotso Tse Botsoang Khafetsa
faq.description: Lipotso le likarabo tse botsoang khafetsa mabapi le khoebo ea liphoofolo tse ruiloeng.

productDetail.title: {sehlooho} - E rekisoa
productDetail.description: E rekisoa ho {title} - {city}. Tobetsa bakeng sa lintlha tse qaqileng le tlhahisoleseling ea ho ikopanya.

sellerDetail.title: {lebitso} - Profaele ea Morekisi
sellerDetail.description: Profaele ea morekisi ea {name}. Litlhahlobo, manane le tlhaiso-leseling ea puisano.

transporterDetail.title: {lebitso} - Profaele ea Mojari
transporterDetail.description: Profaele ea mopalami oa {name}. Libaka tsa litšebeletso, litlhahlobo le tlhaiso-leseling ea puisano.

boost.title: Matlafatso
boost.noBoosts: Ha ho na nalane ea boost hajoale
boost.noBoostsDesc: Reka sephutheloana sa boost ho hlahisa lihlahisoa tsa hau.
boost.availableOnMobile: Ho ka rekoa ka sesebelisoa sa mohala
boost.listingLimitReached: U fihlile moeling oa lenane la hau. Ntlafatsa moralo oa hau.

admin.exchangeRatesDescription: Sheba litefiso tsohle tsa phapanyetsano ea chelete le boemo ba tsona ba ntlafatso.
